name: Overwriting the File with Dev Zero or Null
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Jakob Weinzettl, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Overwriting the File with Dev Zero or Null
SIGMA Description: Detects overwriting (effectively wiping/deleting) of a file.

False positives:
- Appending null bytes to files.
- Legitimate overwrite of files.

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%dd%' AND (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%if=/dev/null%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%if=/dev/zero%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Overwriting the File with Dev Zero or Null on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%dd%' AND (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%if=/dev/null%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%if=/dev/zero%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Overwriting the File with Dev Zero or Null
